meanings.definition: show to be reasonable or provide adequate ground for
examples: The emergency does not warrant all of us buying guns

meanings.definition: show to be right by providing justification or proof
defend, explain, clear away, or make excuses for by reasoning
examples: rationalize the child's seemingly crazy behavior
he rationalized his lack of success
I absolve you from this responsibility

meanings.definition: having words so spaced that lines have straight even margins
